claims.summary: Bidirectional recent-to-stale telemetry transition is implemented and tested.
claims.claim: Astrid asks to verify transition from `bidirectional_recent` to `bidirectional_stale_telemetry` when telemetry age exceeds the stale window.

claims.summary: No-message warmup is distinct from stalled/stale lanes.
claims.claim: Astrid worries that bidirectional connectivity with no telemetry/sensory timestamps may collapse into an ambiguous state.

claims.summary: Safety level, safety decision trace, and outbound drop counter are visible.
claims.claim: Astrid asks to ensure `messages_dropped_safety` increments connect to safety-level / safety-decision trace visibility.
